data.content: Rewrote the max-iterations test to properly exercise terminal-manager.ts:1224-1231. The test drives 10 take-loop iterations by chaining child close(0) events through buildNextTakePrompt, incrementing takeIteration from 1 to 10. When the 10th child closes with code 0, the guard takeIteration >= MAX_TAKE_ITERATIONS fires, calling enforceQueueTerminalInvariant().finally(() => finishSession(1)). All 5 tests pass, lint clean, typecheck clean.
